parameters.command: cd /opt/keystone/bots && EVOLUTION_API_URL=$EVOLUTION_API_URL EVOLUTION_INSTANCE=$EVOLUTION_INSTANCE EVOLUTION_API_KEY=$EVOLUTION_API_KEY node followup_scheduler.js process

nodes.name: Drain follow-up queue (Evolution API)
nodes.notes: Sends every day0/2/5/7 message now due. Enqueue happens in the WA bot on first contact. Set the EVOLUTION_* env vars on the n8n host.
